'''Ferxani''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Polith]] in the [[Polith system]]. Located in the [[Jaso sector/Legends|Jaso sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories, it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]].

{{Planet-stub}}
